creator: jos@islay.demon.nl
text:
mermemaster sets PATH explicitely: PATH=/bin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin
When you have PAGER set to less then mergemaster complains it
cannot find less.

Fix: 

change PATH= line in mergemaster to:
PATH=/bin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin
How-To-Repeat: 
run mergemaster with the environment variable PAGER set to less
